description: Style Note Created for today's generation, this lotto shoe embodies the brand's motto - combining technology and high-octane fashion. An all-weather staple, the style perfectly suits the cosmopolitan vibe you love! Product Details Black shoe with central lace-ups, overlays and perforations Padded tongue and inner Foamy rubber midsole Herringbone grooves on a TPU outsole Material and Care Synthetic Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight Remove dust with a dry clean cloth
